_comment: Curated MLX models for the LLM-bot Tinker UI. Edit this file to add or remove presets — no code change required. The 'default' flag marks the entry the UI selects when creating a new LLM bot. Models pull from HuggingFace at first use and cache in ~/.cache/huggingface/.

presets.label: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct (4-bit) — fast, ~1 GB
presets.description: Default. Small, fast inference (~300-500ms per intent on M-series). Limited reasoning — outputs are monotonous but functional.

presets.label: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct (4-bit) — balanced, ~2 GB
presets.description: Mid-size. Smarter than 1.5B with similar latency on M-series. Good first upgrade.

presets.label: Qwen2.5 7B Instruct (4-bit) — smart, ~4 GB
presets.description: Diversifies intent output meaningfully but inference is 2-3x slower per call. Strategist tick budget may stretch.

presets.label: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct (4-bit) — fast alternative
presets.description: Llama family at similar size to Qwen 1.5B. Useful for comparing model families.
